description: Composition:Red round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort Fitjewellery is the pride collection of every woman - be it studded with precious stones or simple tribal art. Here's paying tribute to the feminine form with this t-shirt from tantra. Pair it with jeans or cargoes for that absolutely chic look.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7", Chest-32", Waist-26"
